paper_title: Lipid and Fatty Acid Analysis and Photosynthetic Parameters in Algae

methods.description: This method involves staining cells with Nile red and using confocal microscopy to capture images of oil bodies, which helps in analyzing lipid content.

steps.description: Cells were stained in the dark with Nile red at a final concentration of 1 μg ml −1 (from a stock of 0.1 mg ml −1 in acetone) and incubated in darkness, for 15 min.
steps.searchable_summary: stain cells with Nile red and incubate in darkness

steps.description: Images of oil bodies were captured using a LSM 510 META laser-scanning confocal microscope (Zeiss, Jena, Germany) with excitation wavelength of 488 nm and emission wavelength of 560-615 nm.
steps.searchable_summary: capture images of oil bodies using confocal microscope

methods.method_name: Flow Cytometry for Lipid Content Detection
methods.description: This method uses Nile red dye in combination with flow cytometry to detect neutral lipid content in cells.

steps.description: The neutral lipid content was detected using Nile red dye in combination with flow cytometry as described previously.
steps.searchable_summary: detect neutral lipid content using flow cytometry

methods.description: This method involves extracting and derivatizing lipids from liquid cultures, followed by analysis of fatty acid methyl esters (FAMEs) using gas chromatography-mass spectrometry (GC-MS).

steps.description: Lipids were extracted and derivatized from liquid culture.
steps.searchable_summary: extract and derivatize lipids from liquid culture

steps.description: Fatty acid methyl esters (FAMEs) were analyzed by gas chromatography-mass spectrometry (GC-MS) in Analytical and Testing Center of Jinan University.
FAMEs were quantified against a standard curve from different concentrations of C19:0 and C21:0 standard mixtures.

methods.description: This method analyzes photosynthetic parameters such as maximum quantum yield of photosystem II and non-photochemical quenching (NPQ) under different light conditions.

steps.description: The maximum quantum yield of photosystem II (Fv/Fm) was measured under HL or ML treatment for 10 h.
steps.searchable_summary: measure Fv/Fm under different light treatments

steps.description: NPQ was measured during ML or HL treatment and LL recovery.

methods.description: This method uses high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC) to analyze pigment content such as chlorophyll a, fucoxanthin, Ddx, and Dtx in algae under different light conditions.

steps.description: HPLC analyses showed that chlorophyll a (Chl a), fucoxanthin, Ddx and Dtx were the dominant pigments in this alga.
Dtx content per cell increased with increasing light intensities, indicating its role in photoprotection.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze Dtx content under light stress
